The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us. We are launching a Star Atlas merch store. Please check it out at Intergalactic
summary.historical_value: Contemporary Intergalactic Herald publication preserved with role and attribution boundaries.
summary.current_validity_warning: Summaries, roadmaps, operational details, and attributed statements require reconciliation with primary and later sources.

article_text:
Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week.
We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us.
We are launching a Star Atlas merch store. Please check it out at Intergalactic Gear.
We are creating a “non-guild” guild. If you are interested in learning more, please go to Intergalactic Coalition.
Star Atlas Chatter #13 – Xcode Adventures & RICHNESS!
RahMega posted a video recapping the past week of Star Atlas updates.
Star Atlas Sage Labs Marketplace Tactics!
Beyond the Horizon posted a video talking about possible tactics in Star Atlas SAGE Labs.
Star Atlas Mining and Crafting Guide
Duyo posted a video guide for mining and crafting in Star Atlas.
Metaverse Nomads #111 Star Atlas w/ Signal
Metaverse Nomads posted a video replay of their Star Atlas livestream.
WEEKLY STAR ATLAS NEWSLETTER #96
Aephia published their weekly Star Atlas newsletter.
Star Atlas – Strategies and Important Factors based on the Atlas Brew
Nebular TV posted a video about strategies for the upcoming SAGE Labs.
THEY CHALLENGED ME TO SAGE LABS!! (Star Atlas)
Atlas Theory posted a video about his Star Atlas challenge with Beyond the Horizon.
The Atlas Brew #79
Star Atlas TV posted a video replay of the latest Atlas Brew.
Star Atlas How To: Nancy – Online Database & Fleet Management Tool
TLDR 3.0 posted a video about the Star Atlas tool Nancy.
Star Atlas Brew #79: Sage Labs Lab – TLDR
TLDR 3.0 posted a video recap of the latest Atlas Brew.
STAR ATLAS #198 PLAYING SAGE LABS (not ME)
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video looking at SAGE Labs gameplay.
Star Atlas – SAGE Labs Gameplay Walk-though!!
Atlas Theory posted a video walkthrough of SAGE Labs gameplay.
10 Best Star Atlas Resources
Duyo posted a video of Star Atlas resources.
